  children={"DNS lookup batch for cname record"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/dns-lookup/cname/batch"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



DNS lookup for cname record type for a list of domains

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"domains":{"example":["example.com","easydmarc.com"],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"maxAgeMs":{"type":"number","description":"Max age of the cache -1:[from cache] 0:[force lookup] ( in ms)","example":3000}},"required":["domains"],"title":"CnameRecordBatchRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"domain":{"type":"string","nullable":false,"description":"The domain name of the CNAME record.","example":"example.com"},"raw":{"type":"string","nullable":false,"description":"The raw CNAME record.","example":"target.example.com."},"object":{"type":"object","description":"The parsed CNAME record."},"validation":{"description":"The validation of the CNAME record.","allOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The key of the validation message."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"The description of the validation."}},"required":["key","message"],"title":"ValidationMessage"}]},"queryStatus":{"example":"NOTFOUND","type":"string","description":"The status of the BIMI TXT record.","enum":["SUCCESS","NODATA","NOTFOUND","TIMEOUT","ERROR","SERVFAIL","NXDOMAIN"],"title":"DnsRecordStatus"},"timestamp":{"type":"number","description":"The timestamp of the CNAME record lookup.","example":1704067200000}},"required":["domain","raw","object","validation","queryStatus","timestamp"],"title":"CnameRecord"}}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"422":{"description":"Unprocessable Entity"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
